tree.name: Ben Sheppard
tree.note: Guard from Belmont, 26th overall pick in 2023 NBA Draft. Pick (CLE own) acquired from CLE in Caris LeVert trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2023 1st Round Pick (#26) via CLE
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: IND traded Caris LeVert and a 2022 2nd round pick (Luke Travers) to CLE for Ricky Rubio, a 2022 2nd round pick (Andrew Nembhard #31), a 2023 1st round pick (Ben Sheppard #26), and a 2027 2nd round pick. CLE also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: Caris LeVert
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from BRK in James Harden 4-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Victor Oladipo
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: IND trades Paul George to OKC for Victor Oladipo and Domantas Sabonis
assetsGivenUp.note: 2018 All-Star and Most Improved Player. Sent to HOU as part of the 4-team Harden trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Paul George
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 10th overall by Indiana in 2010. 7x All-Star who requested a trade in 2017.

assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 4-team trade: BRK sends LeVert to IND and Jarrett Allen + Taurean Prince to CLE; HOU sends Harden to BRK and 2023 2nd (Jalen Pickett) to IND; CLE sends Dante Exum, cash, and 2024 2nd (Tristen Newton) to IND; IND sends Victor Oladipo to HOU

assetsGivenUp.name: 2022 2nd Round Pick (Luke Travers)
assetsGivenUp.note: MIA own pick, acquired in T.J. Warren 3-team trade
